name: myblog-runtime-authority-map

serverHotMirror.role: server-side hot mirror, not editable truth

bookFileIndex.role: book file/index projection only: openlistPath, modified, size, sourceType and cover cache inputs; not semantic metadata authority

bookMetadataLayer.role: editable book metadata layer: stable metadataId, title overrides, tags, category, description, status and collection hints

runtimeState.role: reader memory, highlights, dynamic events and future graph state

fileAccess.role: public file access, blob backend and cold archive

browserLocalCache.role: UI preferences, cache and legacy migration only; never runtime truth, metadata database or object authority

forbiddenAuthorityMerges: build script overlays as metadata database
topic collection as static page authority
Pagefind as dynamic full-site search truth
